title: Add Products Management & Phone Number Login

requirements.text: Replace the current Internet Identity login flow with a phone number-only login. The AuthGuard login prompt and LoginButton component must collect only a phone number (no email or password). Store the phone number as the user identifier and use it to authenticate/create a user session in the backend.

quotes: ask only phone no. For login

acceptanceCriteria: The login screen displays a single phone number input field
No email, password, or Internet Identity prompt is shown
Submitting a valid phone number logs the user in and creates/retrieves their profile
Invalid or empty phone number submissions show an appropriate error message
The backend associates sessions/profiles with the phone number

requirements.text: Add an 'Add Product' management option accessible from the navigation header for admin users. This should link to the existing CreateProduct page (or equivalent). Ensure the admin-only Add Product link is visible in both desktop and mobile navigation when the user has admin role.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin users see an 'Add Product' link in the header navigation on both desktop and mobile
Non-admin users do not see the 'Add Product' link
Clicking 'Add Product' navigates to the product creation form
The product creation form allows entering product name, description, price, stock, and selecting an image
Successfully submitting the form creates a new product and shows a confirmation

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Keep all Motoko backend logic within backend/main.mo single actor
nonGoals: SMS OTP verification for phone number (plain phone number entry only)
Removing or replacing existing product catalog, cart, or checkout flows
